arts.ttl: Real Madrid possible starting line-up against Barcelona in Spanish Super Cup final
arts.sum: Real Madrid approaches the Spanish Super Cup final with the confidence that the players who ended the semifinals with minor concerns – Federico Valverde and Jude Bellingham – will be fit to feature in this new Clásico against Barcelona . Luka Modric, who missed the semifinals due to the flu, will be available but is expected to continue in his role as the first substitute for the midfield, bringing consistency and class from the bench.

arts.ttl: Barcelona to continue Marcus Rashford pursuit next week
arts.sum: Barcelona are hopeful of making at least one signing this month, and Marcus Rashford is a player that is high on the agenda. The 27-year-old is almost certain to leave Manchester United on loan, and the Catalans see him as an achievable target, although they will need to move on at least one player before […] The post Barcelona to continue Marcus Rashford pursuit next week appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barcelona considering move for 14 G/A Liverpool star after missing out on Arsenal transfer target
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly considering a transfer swoop for Liverpool forward Luis Diaz as they look at multiple options in that area of the pitch. Diaz has shone for Liverpool and looks like he could be a good fit for Barca, though one imagines the Reds won’t be too keen to let the talented Colombia international […] The post Barcelona considering move for 14 G/A Liverpool star after missing out on Arsenal transfer target appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: ‘It’s a lie’ - Barca star Pedri hits out at Dani Olmo boycott rumors
arts.sum: Pedri has hit back at reports Barcelona players were prepared to snub Spain duty if Dani Olmo remained unregistered and couldn’t play for the national team. “People said the Spain national team players wouldn’t go but I heard that and was surprised by that, it’s a lie,” he told reporters.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Barcelona - Supercopa de Espana: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid take on Barcelona in the 2025 Spanish Super Cup final. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups and more.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund make major effort in attempt to sign Marcus Rashford as they look to beat AC Milan and Barcelona to Man United star
arts.sum: More talks are planned this week with Rashford's entourage but the Bundesliga side have a good relationship with Manchester United.
